updates.title: Update
updates.summary:
- Reduced the sky elevator repair cost from 20 -> 10 for the demo
- Removed the recoil/ knockback the boomboxer gives during attacks
- Make boomboxer’s attack hit speed higher from 1.5s to 1.8
- Locked the Deep Sea biome for the demo, opened the into space biome (partly, it’s more atmospheric)
